title: neubeckia stylosa
intro: Neubeckia stylosa, also known as New Zealand mistflower, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is a shrub-like plant with white and blue flowers, often used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Neubeckia stylosa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been traditionally used to soothe coughs and colds, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
